title: Broadcast the Secret
tagline: Publish an immortal secret to 8 billion people and still keep it perfectly secret.
holy_shit: You publish an immortal secret to eight billion people today and still keep it perfectly secret until one paper key surfaces — a dead-man's switch with nothing left to pay for.
powered_by: rapp-sealed/1.0 (AES-256-GCM; key-possession is the only gate) + native WebCrypto
agent_scenario: When data must be published to a fully public, permanent store yet remain readable only by a key-holder — privacy as a seal, not a location.
author: kody-w + Claude
